zh.lifeSummary: Elaine DeLutterell於1092年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆。她於1112年與John Mansel在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1192年在英國英格蘭享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Elaine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally an Old French form of Helen , but now generally regarded as an independent name. The Greek and Latin forms of the name had a long vowel in the second syllable, which produced this form (as opposed to Ellen ) in Old French. In Arthurian legend, Elaine is the name of one of the women who fell in love with Lancelot . The name occurs in this form in the 15th-century English Morte d'Arthur of Thomas Malory . In the 19th century it was popularized in one of Tennyson's Idylls of the King ( 1859 ). Most of the characters in Arthurian legend have names that are Celtic in origin, although subjected to heavy French influence, and it has therefore been suggested that Elaine may actually be derived from a Welsh word meaning ‘hind’ or ‘fawn’.

en.lifeSummary: Elaine DeLutterell was born in 1092, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Mansel in 1112, in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1192, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 100.

ja.lifeSummary: Elaine DeLutterellは1092年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで生まれた。1112年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデンでJohn Manselと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1192年にイギリスイギリスで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elaine DeLutterell(은)는 1092년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1112년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 리틀 미센든에서 John Mansel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1192년 영국 잉글랜드에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.
